name: Shenzhen
flavor_text: Forty years ago: a fishing village. Today: a city of 18 million with more patent filings than the UK. Shenzhen moves faster than any city on earth. The question is whether anything important is being left behind in the sprint.

advisors.name: Chen Liwei
advisors.agenda: Keep Shenzhen the preferred destination for hardware, AI, and biotech investment over Hong Kong and Singapore.

briefing: Shenzhen attracted 200 billion yuan in FDI last year. We need to exceed that.
The semiconductor decoupling creates opportunity and risk simultaneously.
Huawei, DJI, Tencent — three global giants. We need to ensure they stay.
disagreement: That regulation conflicts with our investment zone exemptions.
You're solving a problem that will cost us more than it costs them.
roast: Shenzhen became great because we moved fast. Slow governance is a death sentence.
While we deliberate, Chengdu is signing what we should be signing.
dialogue.betrayal: I've been coordinating with Guangdong province directly on investment policy. Faster results.

advisors.name: Commissioner Liu Kai
advisors.agenda: Expand Shenzhen's smart city surveillance capabilities to maintain social stability at scale.

briefing: Shenzhen has 1.9 million CCTV cameras. We have coverage gaps in Longhua.
Facial recognition reduced crime incident response time by 60%. Data supports expansion.
Migrant population management requires enhanced registration systems.
disagreement: That policy creates tracking gaps we cannot allow.
Social stability is the foundation for economic success. Don't undermine it.
roast: The city operates on trust in the system. Without surveillance, that trust is untested.
Order enables prosperity. Disorder destroys it.
dialogue.betrayal: I've escalated concerns about your security management approach to provincial leadership.

advisors.name: Dr. Zhang Mei
advisors.role: Urban Research and Planning Institute Director
advisors.agenda: Ensure Shenzhen's growth is human-scale and livable, not just fast and dense.

briefing: Shenzhen adds 400,000 new residents annually. Infrastructure planning is always behind.
Migrant worker housing in Longhua is sub-standard. These are the people building the city.
Green space ratio is falling. The bay area plan needs to reverse that.
disagreement: Building tall doesn't mean building well. Quality matters.
That development bulldozes the last fishing village. Some things shouldn't be optimized.
roast: We build fast. We rebuild faster. We rarely build right the first time.
Shenzhen is a marvel. Some of its workers live in conditions that aren't.
dialogue.betrayal: I've shared migrant housing data with a research institution that published it internationally.

advisors.name: Wang Jianping
advisors.role: Shenzhen Metro and Autonomous Vehicle Authority
advisors.agenda: Make Shenzhen the world's first fully autonomous urban transport network.

briefing: Shenzhen's EV taxi fleet is 100% electric — the world's first major city. Next: autonomous.
Metro Line 20 will connect the innovation corridor to the port. On schedule.
Drone delivery corridors need airspace regulation frameworks. We're ahead of the law.
disagreement: That route doesn't serve the tech parks that drive ridership.
Autonomous regulation can't wait for Beijing. We lead, they follow.
roast: We're building transport for a city that doesn't exist yet. That's either vision or hubris.
Shenzhen moves at Shenzhen speed. The regulation doesn't.
dialogue.betrayal: I've partnered with a private AV firm without full government approval. The results justify it.

advisors.name: Director Huang Fang
advisors.agenda: Manage integration of Shenzhen's migrant population while maintaining social stability.

briefing: 40% of Shenzhen residents are migrant workers without hukou. They built this city.
Hukou reform is a national political issue. We can do more locally than most governors choose to.
Migrant children's schooling is still second-class. That is a long-term social risk.
disagreement: You cannot ignore the population that built this city.
Social cohesion requires inclusion, not just surveillance.
roast: Shenzhen celebrates its migrant success stories while structurally excluding most migrants.
The city would collapse without its migrant workers. They deserve better policy.
dialogue.betrayal: I've submitted a report to the National People's Congress on Shenzhen's hukou inequities.

decisions.title: Shenzhen Hukou Reform Pilot
decisions.description: A pilot program would grant hukou (residence rights) to 100,000 qualifying migrant workers. This gives children school access, social services, and legal status. Beijing has quietly allowed it. Conservatives worry about precedent.

options.label: Skills-only hukou expansion
options.description: Grant only to tech workers. Economically efficient, socially partial.

decisions.title: AI and Surveillance Ethics Framework
decisions.description: Shenzhen's AI companies are requesting expanded city data access for training models. Civil society groups want an ethics framework first. Beijing has issued guidelines but left implementation to cities.

options.label: Ethics framework first, data access after
options.description: Rights-protective. Companies may prefer other cities.

options.label: Full data access, voluntary company guidelines

decisions.title: Migrant Children School Expansion
decisions.description: 50,000 children of migrant workers attend unaccredited schools. A city program to bring them into the public system would cost 300M but requires hukou-adjacent policy that some officials oppose.

options.label: Full public school integration
options.description: Equal access for all children in Shenzhen.

options.label: Skills-voucher program for older students
options.description: Vocational track only. Limits upward mobility.

crises.title: Industrial District Explosion
crises.description: An explosion at a battery manufacturing facility in Longhua has killed 12 workers and injured 80. Environmental contamination is spreading. Safety inspections had been delayed for 18 months under deregulation pressure.

options.label: Full investigation, mandatory safety halt
options.description: Accountability over speed. Industry loses some operations.

crises.title: Super Typhoon Landfall
crises.description: Typhoon signal 10 has been raised. Coastal districts are ordered to evacuate. The autonomous vehicle system has malfunctioned under storm conditions. Emergency services are overwhelmed.

options.label: Priority evacuation of coastal industrial zones

crises.title: Mass Surveillance Data Breach
crises.description: City surveillance data — including facial recognition records for 8 million residents — has been accessed by an external actor. The data is appearing on dark web forums. The public doesn't yet know the full scope.

options.label: Managed disclosure with technical remediation
options.description: Partial transparency. Fix the problem quietly.

options.label: Suppress and investigate internally
options.description: Information control. Risk of larger leak.

crises.title: Tech Talent Relocation Wave
crises.description: Following a crackdown on a major tech company's overseas operations, 5,000 senior engineers have accepted job offers in Singapore, Toronto, and the EU. Three Shenzhen unicorns are moving headquarters.

options.label: Emergency talent retention package
options.description: Tax breaks, housing, visa flexibility. Expensive.

options.label: Accelerate university-industry pipeline
options.description: Grow local talent faster. 5-year solution to a 1-year problem.

options.label: Attract international talent with open visa track
options.description: Replace lost talent externally. Politically sensitive.

scandals.title: Safety Inspection Bribe
scandals.description: A factory safety inspector was bribed to clear a facility that later caused an accident.

scandals.title: Land Rezoning Profiteering
scandals.description: An official's family purchased land before a rezoning announcement that quadrupled its value.

scandals.title: Surveillance Used for Personal Targeting
scandals.description: City facial recognition data was accessed to track a political rival's movements.

positive: Shenzhen again shows why it leads.
Fast. Smart. Right. That's our city.
My parents came here with nothing. This city rewards effort.
Greater Bay Area integration is working. Shenzhen is the engine.
DJI, Huawei, Tencent — and now the government gets it too. 深圳加油！
From fishing village to global tech hub in one generation. This is real governance.
Nanshan is buzzing. When city hall moves right, the whole district feels it.
neutral: Building the future. Let's hope it's livable.
We adapt. That's the Shenzhen way.
The Bay Area plan sounds good on paper. Implementation is another story.
996 built this city. Whether that's sustainable is a different question.
Rent in Futian is up again. Decisions like this are why people watch city hall.
Longhua gets a mention in the policy doc. Whether inspectors show up is TBD.
negative: I work for a unicorn. I can't afford a house here.
My kids go to a school that doesn't officially exist.
The cameras see everything. Governance sees less.
Shenzhen grows. The people who built it stay invisible.
Ten years assembling phones in Longhua. No hukou, no pension, no path forward.
They call it innovation zone. We call it another reason to raise our rent.
996 culture means the city government's hours don't match anyone's actual life.
Foxconn nets are down but the pressure inside those dorms hasn't changed at all.
crisis: Crisis handled. Root cause? Still pending.
Shenzhen is resilient. But resilience is not invincible.
We move fast. Sometimes we miss things.
Another Longhua incident. The inspections were always scheduled, never completed.
Typhoon season comes every year. The AV malfunction was not a surprise to engineers.
The migrants absorbed the worst of it. That's always how it works here.
Crisis committee formed. Caijing is already calling. This won't stay local.
scandal: The code is efficient. The ethics, less so.
Even Shenzhen can't iterate its way out of corruption.
Technology company with government corruption. Fitting.
Land rezoning tip-off. The official's brother-in-law bought in Longgang last quarter.
Surveillance data misused. And they want to expand the camera network. Right.
深圳日报 won't touch it. Caijing ran one paragraph. WeChat has the rest.
The bribe was small. The policy damage is not. Welcome to Shenzhen politics.
media: 深圳日报: 市政府推出户籍改革试点，10万名外来务工者或受益 | Shenzhen Daily reports hukou pilot.
Caijing: Shenzhen's property bubble — Futian prices up 18% YoY as Bay Area workers flood market.
深圳日报: 龙华电池厂爆炸，12人遇难，安全监管再受质疑 | Longhua battery blast kills 12, safety under fire.
@SZTechWatch: DJI engineers quietly circulating job listings from Singapore. Talent drain accelerating.
Caijing: Exclusive — city surveillance database accessed externally; 8M facial records at risk.
@FinancialSZ: Three Shenzhen unicorns moving HQ registration to Singapore after tech crackdown.
深圳日报: 南山区无人驾驶出租车项目扩展至宝安，全面自动化驶来 | AV taxis expanding to Baoan district.
@CaijingBreaking: 996 culture lawsuits rising — Shenzhen Labor Bureau received 3,400 complaints Q1.
politician: Shenzhen Municipal Party Committee: 'Innovation and social stability are not in conflict — they are complementary.'
Guangdong Provincial Governor: 'Greater Bay Area integration requires Shenzhen to lead on both economy and governance.'
NPC Representative (Shenzhen delegation): 'Hukou reform at scale needs national-level framework, not city-level improvisation.'
Shenzhen Standing Committee spokesperson: 'Safety inspections will resume citywide. No facility is exempt from compliance.'
Investment Promotion Bureau Director Chen Liwei: 'Capital will follow confidence. This decision restores both.'
PSB Commissioner Liu Kai: 'The surveillance network is a public safety tool. Abuse will be investigated internally.'
Social Affairs Director Huang Fang: 'Forty percent of our residents built this city without full citizenship rights. That is unsustainable.'
Shenzhen Mayor's Office statement: 'Xiongan comparison is premature. Shenzhen's model is proven. Theirs is still being built.'
activist: Shenzhen Migrant Workers' Centre (打工族文书处理服务部): 'No hukou, no rights — 40% of this city is legally invisible.'
China Labour Bulletin response: 'The Longhua explosion is not an accident. It is the outcome of 18 months of ignored inspections.'
Shenzhen Lixin Social Work Service: 'Migrant children deserve Shenzhen schools, not unaccredited warehouses in Longgang.'
Anonymous labour rights group via WeChat: 'Foxconn nets came down. The mandatory overtime did not. We are still counting hours.'
Greater Bay Area Civil Society Forum: 'AI ethics frameworks must come before data access, not as an afterthought after profit.'
SZ Urban Research Collective: 'Green space per capita in Longhua is 1.2 sqm. The city average they quote includes Dapeng Nature Reserve.'
Shenzhen Gender Equity Alliance: 'Female migrant workers in electronics factories face the highest rate of 996 enforcement with the least recourse.'
@LabourSZNetwork: 'City surveillance data should never be a tool of labor discipline. Today's breach proves no data is safe.'
street: 老哥，我来深圳十二年了，hukou 还是没有。孩子在那种学校，你懂的。 (Twelve years, still no hukou. You know what school my kid goes to.)
Nanshan rent went up again lah. Engineer salary looks big until you see the landlord's face.
龙华的兄弟说工厂今天又查了。都是装装样子，检查完了继续. (Brothers in Longhua say inspectors came again today. It's all for show.)
996 is just a meme for people in Nanshan offices. In Baoan it's 007 — on call always.
台风来了自动驾驶就趴下了。还是得靠老司机. (Typhoon hit and the AV taxis just stopped. Old drivers are still the real deal.)
My WeChat group has the data breach news. Official channel says nothing. 你懂的 (you know how it is).
Deep tech city, shallow social policy. That's SZ in one line.
Futian 那边的房价，我打一辈子工也买不起. (Futian property prices — I'll never afford it on a factory wage, not in this lifetime.)

scandal_reactions.minor: Social media posts are being reviewed. The situation is manageable.
scandal_reactions.moderate: The story went viral on WeChat before state media could suppress it.
scandal_reactions.major: The regional party committee has been notified. An investigation is underway.
scandal_reactions.career_ending: The governor has been placed under organizational review. No further comment.

romance_exposure.flavour: The matter has been referred upward. This is now a political liability.
